RULING AFTER HEARING: PRODUCTION SHALL BE MADE SUBJECT TO A PROTECTIVE ORDER. THE PRODUCTION SHALL NOT INCLUDE ANY REFERENCE TO SEXUAL CONDUCT AND/OR RELATIONS AND SHALL REDACT ANY COMMUNICATIONS WITH HER HUSBAND AND ANY REFERENCES TO THE JOINT SESSIONS EXCEPT UPON A SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE AFTER PRODUCTION; AND THE TIME PERIOD SHALL BE SEPTEMBER 2004 TO PRESENT. Notice Of Motion To Enforce Subpoena To Dr. David Richman For Pltf'S Medical Records;
Off Calendar Jul-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Sara Wilson,for Defendants/Moving party Greene Radovsky Maloney & Share, LLP., et al
Daniel Feder, for Plaintiff/Opposing party Stefano Stroniolo

Hearing held on Defendants Greene Radovsky Maloney and Share, LLP.'s Motion To Enforce Subpoena To Dr. David Richman For Plaintiff's Medical Records.
RULING AFTER HEARING: Production shall be made subject to a protective order. The production shall not include any reference to sexual conduct and/or relations and shall redact any communications with her husband and any references to the joint sessions except upon a showing of good cause after production; and the time period shall be September 2004 to present. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Set For Trial On Dec-11-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-22-06 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 504
